name: tutorial-conditional-branching
title: Conditional Branching
description: Route a request to different paths based on data. Demonstrates decision steps, 'when' expressions with comparisons, the 'else' catch-all, and multiple paths converging on a single terminal.

steps.name: Submit Request
steps.description: Submit a request with a priority level that determines the routing.

steps.name: Route by Priority
steps.description: Automatic routing — critical/high go to fast-track, normal goes to manual review.
